problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Deep. Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
